title: Drop goal sinks Knysna United
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna United RFC went down...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna United RFC went down narrowly 25-22 against newly promoted Riversdal Rugby Club in a SWD Super B-league match last Saturday at Loerie Park. Riversdal stunned the home crowd with a try in the first few minutes of the game.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna United RFC went down narrowly 25-22 against newly promoted Riversdal Rugby Club in a SWD Super B-league match last Saturday at Loerie Park. Riversdal stunned the home crowd with a try in the first few minutes of the game."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"United however responded strongly with their trademark hard-running rugby to take a 17-8 lead at halftime."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second half saw Riversdal regroup and come out with renewed energy to slowly chip away at the lead.","html":"The second half saw Riversdal regroup and come out with renewed energy to slowly chip away at the lead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With just two minutes left, the scores were tied at 22-22. In a nail-biting finale, Riversdal seized the moment with a drop goal, clinching their first-ever league victory in Knysna.","html":"With just two minutes left, the scores were tied at 22-22. In a nail-biting finale, Riversdal seized the moment with a drop goal, clinching their first-ever league victory in Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna United B-team","html":"Knysna United B-team"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The game of the Knysna United B-team also proved to be a great match. The forwards of the home team dominated, racing to a 27-7 lead at halftime.","html":"The game of the Knysna United B-team also proved to be a great match. The forwards of the home team dominated, racing to a 27-7 lead at halftime."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Riversdal's resilience shone through in the second half, but United held firm, securing a 37-19 victory.","html":"Riversdal's resilience shone through in the second half, but United held firm, securing a 37-19 victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
